title: BES-26: React.memo + useCallback on Player Detail components
description:
## Problem
Player Detail page has 5 major components (300-518 lines each) without React.memo(). Every parent state change re-renders all of them.

## BEFORE
- **Define:** Add memo() to unmemoized Player Detail components + useCallback on PriceChart pointer handler
- **Scope:** 5 files to edit
- **Criteria:**
  - [ ] tsc --noEmit: 0 errors
  - [ ] All existing Player Detail tests green
  - [ ] grep confirms memo() on all 5 components

## Changes Required

### 1. EDIT: `src/components/player/detail/TradingCardFrame.tsx` (518 lines)
- Import memo from react
- Rename the component function to TradingCardFrameInner
- Export: `export default memo(TradingCardFrameInner);`
- Pattern reference: see PlayerHero.tsx line 328

### 2. EDIT: `src/components/player/detail/TradingTab.tsx` (482 lines)
- Same pattern: rename to TradingTabInner, export default memo(TradingTabInner)

### 3. EDIT: `src/components/player/detail/PriceChart.tsx` (238 lines)
- Add memo() wrapper on export
- ALSO: Find the pointer/mouse event handler and wrap it with useCallback
- Import useCallback from react if not already imported

### 4. EDIT: `src/components/player/detail/PerformanceTab.tsx` (359 lines)
- Same memo pattern

### 5. EDIT: `src/components/player/detail/CommunityTab.tsx` (391 lines)
- Same memo pattern

## Reference Pattern (from PlayerHero.tsx)
```tsx
import { memo } from 'react';
function PlayerHeroInner({ ... }: Props) { ... }
export default memo(PlayerHeroInner);
```

## AFTER Checklist
- [ ] tsc --noEmit: 0 errors
- [ ] vitest run -- all player detail tests green
- [ ] grep -r 'memo(' src/components/player/detail/ shows 7 memo() usages (2 existing + 5 new)
- [ ] Self-review all changed files
